import { Alpine, createPageMixin } from './src/alpine/index.js' import { logger } from './src/utils/logger.js' import { request, buildURL, API_PREFIX } from './src/api/base.js' import { SYSTEM_ENDPOINTS } from './src/api/system/index.js' document.addEventListener('alpine:init', () => { Alpine.data('zoneManagement', () => ({ ...createPageMixin(), // ===== 状态 ===== current_tab: 'zones', zones: [], zones_loading: false, zones_total: 0, zone_page: 1, zone_filters: { zone_type: '', status: '', keyword: '' }, groups: [], groups_loading: false, groups_total: 0, group_page: 1, group_filters: { keyword: '' }, zone_form_visible: false, zone_form: { zone_id: null, zone_type: 'district', zone_name: '', priority: 10, parent_zone_id: null }, group_form_visible: false, group_form: { group_id: null, group_name: '', pricing_mode: 'sum', discount_rate: 1.0, fixed_price: null }, PRICING_MODE_MAP: { sum: '累加', discount: '折扣', fixed: '固定价' }, // ===== 初始化 ===== async init() { logger.info('[ZoneManagement] 页面初始化') await this.loadZones() }, // ===== 地域 CRUD ===== async loadZones() { this.zones_loading = true try { const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: this.zone_page, page_size: 20 }) if (this.zone_filters.zone_type) params.set('zone_type', this.zone_filters.zone_type) if (this.zone_filters.status) params.set('status', this.zone_filters.status) if (this.zone_filters.keyword) params.set('keyword', this.zone_filters.keyword) const response = await request({ url: SYSTEM_ENDPOINTS.AD_ZONE_LIST + '?' + params.toString(), method: 'GET' }) if (response?.success) { this.zones = response.data?.rows || [] this.zones_total = response.data?.count || 0 } } catch (error) { logger.error('加载地域列表失败:', error) } finally { this.zones_loading = false } }, showZoneForm() { this.zone_form = { zone_id: null, zone_type: 'district', zone_name: '', priority: 10, parent_zone_id: null } this.zone_form_visible = true }, editZone(zone) { this.zone_form = { zone_id: zone.zone_id, zone_type: zone.zone_type, zone_name: zone.zone_name, priority: zone.priority, parent_zone_id: zone.parent_zone_id } this.zone_form_visible = true }, async saveZone() { try { const data = { ...this.zone_form } if (!data.parent_zone_id) delete data.parent_zone_id let response if (data.zone_id) { const url = buildURL(SYSTEM_ENDPOINTS.AD_ZONE_UPDATE, { id: data.zone_id }) response = await request({ url, method: 'PUT', data }) } else { response = await request({ url: SYSTEM_ENDPOINTS.AD_ZONE_CREATE, method: 'POST', data }) } if (response?.success) { Alpine.store('notification').show(data.zone_id ? '地域更新成功' : '地域创建成功', 'success') this.zone_form_visible = false await this.loadZones() } } catch (error) { logger.error('保存地域失败:', error) Alpine.store('notification').show('保存地域失败: ' + error.message, 'error') } }, async toggleZoneStatus(zone) { const newStatus = zone.status === 'active' ? 'inactive' : 'active' try { const url = buildURL(SYSTEM_ENDPOINTS.AD_ZONE_UPDATE, { id: zone.zone_id }) const response = await request({ url, method: 'PUT', data: { status: newStatus } }) if (response?.success) { Alpine.store('notification').show(`地域已${newStatus === 'active' ? '启用' : '停用'}`, 'success') await this.loadZones() } } catch (error) { logger.error('切换地域状态失败:', error) } }, async deleteZone(zoneId) { if (!confirm('确定删除该地域？此操作不可恢复。')) return try { const url = buildURL(SYSTEM_ENDPOINTS.AD_ZONE_DELETE, { id: zoneId }) const response = await request({ url, method: 'DELETE' }) if (response?.success) { Alpine.store('notification').show('地域已删除', 'success') await this.loadZones() } } catch (error) { logger.error('删除地域失败:', error) Alpine.store('notification').show('删除失败: ' + error.message, 'error') } }, // ===== 联合组 CRUD ===== async loadGroups() { this.groups_loading = true try { const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: this.group_page, page_size: 20 }) if (this.group_filters.keyword) params.set('keyword', this.group_filters.keyword) const response = await request({ url: SYSTEM_ENDPOINTS.AD_ZONE_GROUP_LIST + '?' + params.toString(), method: 'GET' }) if (response?.success) { this.groups = response.data?.rows || [] this.groups_total = response.data?.count || 0 } } catch (error) { logger.error('加载联合组列表失败:', error) } finally { this.groups_loading = false } }, showGroupForm() { this.group_form = { group_id: null, group_name: '', pricing_mode: 'sum', discount_rate: 1.0, fixed_price: null } this.group_form_visible = true }, editGroup(group) { this.group_form = { group_id: group.group_id, group_name: group.group_name, pricing_mode: group.pricing_mode, discount_rate: group.discount_rate, fixed_price: group.fixed_price } this.group_form_visible = true }, async saveGroup() { try { const data = { ...this.group_form } let response if (data.group_id) { const url = buildURL(SYSTEM_ENDPOINTS.AD_ZONE_GROUP_UPDATE, { id: data.group_id }) response = await request({ url, method: 'PUT', data }) } else { response = await request({ url: SYSTEM_ENDPOINTS.AD_ZONE_GROUP_CREATE, method: 'POST', data }) } if (response?.success) { Alpine.store('notification').show(data.group_id ? '联合组更新成功' : '联合组创建成功', 'success') this.group_form_visible = false await this.loadGroups() } } catch (error) { logger.error('保存联合组失败:', error) Alpine.store('notification').show('保存失败: ' + error.message, 'error') } }, async deleteGroup(groupId) { if (!confirm('确定删除该联合组？关联的成员记录也会一并删除。')) return try { const url = buildURL(SYSTEM_ENDPOINTS.AD_ZONE_GROUP_DELETE, { id: groupId }) const response = await request({ url, method: 'DELETE' }) if (response?.success) { Alpine.store('notification').show('联合组已删除', 'success') await this.loadGroups() } } catch (error) { logger.error('删除联合组失败:', error) Alpine.store('notification').show('删除失败: ' + error.message, 'error') } } })) })
